reports.name: Maandkentallen
reports.query:
SELECT
    L1.station as stationsCode,
    st.OMSCHRIJVING             AS station,
    L1.jaar,
    L1.maand,
    ROUND(AVG(L1.tg), 2)       AS tg,
    SUM(L1.ijsdagen)            AS ijsdagen,
    SUM(L1.vorstdagen)          AS vorstdagen,
    SUM(L1.warme_dagen)         AS warme_dagen,
    SUM(L1.zomerse_dagen)       AS zomerse_dagen,
    SUM(L1.tropische_dagen)     AS tropische_dagen
FROM stations st
JOIN (
    SELECT
        eg.STATION              AS station,
        eg.JAAR                 AS jaar,
        eg.MAAND                AS maand,
        eg.TG                   AS tg,
        CASE WHEN eg.TX <  0  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ijsdagen,
        CASE WHEN eg.TN <  0  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS vorstdagen,
        CASE WHEN eg.TX >= 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS warme_dagen,
        CASE WHEN eg.TX >= 25 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS zomerse_dagen,
        CASE WHEN eg.TX >= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS tropische_dagen
    FROM etmgeg eg
    WHERE 1=1
    <#SELECTIONS>
) L1 ON L1.station = st.CODE
GROUP BY
    L1.station,
    st.OMSCHRIJVING,
    L1.jaar,
    L1.maand
ORDER BY L1.jaar, L1.maand

reports.name: Jaarkentallen
reports.query:
SELECT
    L1.station as stationsCode,
    st.OMSCHRIJVING             AS station,
    L1.jaar,
    ROUND(AVG(L1.tg), 2)       AS tg,
    SUM(L1.ijsdagen)            AS ijsdagen,
    SUM(L1.vorstdagen)          AS vorstdagen,
    SUM(L1.warme_dagen)         AS warme_dagen,
    SUM(L1.zomerse_dagen)       AS zomerse_dagen,
    SUM(L1.tropische_dagen)     AS tropische_dagen
FROM stations st
JOIN (
    SELECT
        eg.STATION              AS station,
        eg.JAAR                 AS jaar,
        eg.TG                   AS tg,
        CASE WHEN eg.TX <  0  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ijsdagen,
        CASE WHEN eg.TN <  0  THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS vorstdagen,
        CASE WHEN eg.TX >= 20 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS warme_dagen,
        CASE WHEN eg.TX >= 25 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS zomerse_dagen,
        CASE WHEN eg.TX >= 30 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS tropische_dagen
    FROM etmgeg eg
    WHERE 1=1
    <#SELECTIONS>
) L1 ON L1.station = st.CODE
GROUP BY
    L1.station,
    st.OMSCHRIJVING,
    L1.jaar
ORDER BY L1.jaar
